From: Chartering - Ocean Reaper Maritime <chartering@ocean-reaper.com>
Sent: 11 November 2025 16:53
To: Kavita Jantwal - Ocean Reaper Maritime <kavita.jantwal@ocean-reaper.com>
Subject: // FIRM ENQUIRY // ACCT : VEDANTA LTD, BALCO OR NOM // BULK ALUMINA, 30000 MT (+/-5% CHOPT) // RAS-AL-KHAIR - KAKINADA / GANGAVARAM // || LAYCAN: 01-07 DEC'25

GOOD DAY !

KIND ATTN : CHARTERING DESK

//
Please submit your bids by or before 13rd Nov 2025 12 pm IST & your offer should be valid till 16th Nov 2025 12 pm IST

ACCOUNT: VEDANTA LTD, BALCO OR NOMINEES

CARGO: SMELTER GRADE ALUMINA IN BULK

QUANTITY: 30000 MT (+/- 5% CHOPT)

LOAD PORT: 1 SBP RAS AL KHAIR , SAUDI ARABIA

DISCHARGE PORT: 1 SBP KAKINADA OR 1 SBP GANGAVARAM, EAST COAST OF INDIA (DISCH PORT TO BE DECLARED BEFORE VESSEL DEPARTS LOAD PORT)

LAYCAN: 01-07 DEC 2025

LOAD RATE : Ras-al-Khair basis 2800 MTPD
DISCHARGE RATE : Kakinada / Gangavaram , East Coast of India,
Kakinada basis 6000 , 7000 , 8000 , 9000 , 10000 , 11000 , 12000 MTPD
Gangavaram basis 3500 MTPD.

NILL ADDCOM + 1.25% BROKERAGE TO OCEAN REAPER MARITIME
Age: Not exceeding 15 years.
Demurrage and Despatch as per CP terms.

For load port vessel acceptance, charterers intend to have max 48 hrs time due to different time zones. Also, charterers would prefer vessel arrival at LP on 1st day of Laycan . Kindly note that LP Terms, Conditions & attached standard CP are non-negotiable & owners should give acceptance to the same while quoting Point to be noted that Once the subs lifted, within 24 hours CP must be signed off .The final CP will be supported with signed off document and will be part of agreement. 

Any submission after the cut-off time will not be considered and kindly don't change the subject.
//

KIND REGARDS,
Ms KAVITA JANTWAL
M           : +91 9971050029 | +91 989966539
